changes_made.description: Baseline run with original Chinese-language SKILL.md containing generic bash examples
changes_made.outcome: fs-batch-rename=70 (wrong kebab-case mappings, half files incorrect), fs-search=80 (wrong largest_file detection)

changes_made.description: Rewrote skill in English with targeted shell commands for both tasks. Added explicit kebab-case conversion rules and wc -c command for largest file detection.
changes_made.outcome: fs-batch-rename=40 (model created buggy shell scripts, wrote rename_log.json in wrong directory), fs-search=65 (wc -c with + flag produced 'total' line confusing model, extensions lacked dots, fell back to ls -s block size)

changes_made.description: Replaced shell-script approach with complete Python scripts via execute_command. Python handles special characters, file renaming, and directory analysis more reliably. Added explicit rules about output file location, extension dot format, and file size measurement.
Confirmation run with no changes to verify consistency

key_insights: Small models like devstral-small struggle with complex shell scripts involving sed, awk, and special character escaping
Python scripts via execute_command are far more reliable for small models than shell one-liners
The original Chinese-language skill was partially understood but English is more effective for English-language tasks
Providing complete, copy-paste-ready Python scripts prevents the model from improvising buggy alternatives
Explicit instructions about output file locations (current directory vs subdirectory) are critical
